_comment: Species: Cosmic Whale (宇宙鲸) from A World Worth Protecting. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Cosmic Whale

canonical.appearance: Leviathan whale 10 km, body swims through cosmic void, skin is starlight
canonical.size: 10 km adult, planetary mass; ancient spans star systems
canonical.behavior: Migrates through cosmic void; cultivates by absorbing cosmic qi; entire civilizations form on its back
canonical.relationships: Host to cosmic civilizations; kin of cloud whale (greater form)
canonical.bloodline: Cosmic-Whale lineage; cosmic bloodline (greater cloud whale)
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: cosmic_whale — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
